case_title: WEHRMAN, DAVID F. VS MINTER, JOSEPH DARREN,AKA DARREN JOSEPH MINTER

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $580.00 FILED BY WEHRMAN, DAVID F. AS TO DEFENDANT MINTER, JOSEPH DARREN,AKA DARREN JOSEPH MINTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DARREN JOSEPH MINTER AKA JOSEPH DARREN RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEHRMAN, DAVID F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MINTER, JOSEPH DARREN,AKA DARREN JOSEPH MINTER $580.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
